LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK'S MOTION TO ENTER JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP 664.6. PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK'S MOTION TO ENTER JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. DISCOVER BANK IS ENTITLED TO A JUDGMENT IN ITS FAVOR AND AGAINST DEFENDANT CHRISTINA CAMANO IN THE PRINCIPAL AMOUNT OF $8,746.06 PLUS COSTS DETERMINED PER THE MEMORANDUM OF COSTS PROCEDURE. ORDER AND JUDGMENT ARE SIGNED. (SEE SCANNED ORDER AND JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS)JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: M. MOTION - Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enter Judgment
Off Calendar Nov-13-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK'S Motion To Enter Judgment Pursuant to CCP 664.6.

Plaintiff Discover Bank's motion to enter judgment is granted. No opposition filed. Discover Bank is entitled to a judgment in its favor and against defendant Christina Camano in the principal amount of $8,746.06 plus costs determined per the memorandum of costs procedure.

Order and Judgment are signed. (see scanned order and judgment for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/HK)
